queries.plan:
Estimate    Actual  Operator
       -         1  PROJECT a1
       -         1  AGGREGATE COUNT(c_custkey) AS a1
       -         0  PROJECT c_custkey
       -         0  PROJECT c_custkey
       -         0  RIGHT ANTI JOIN HASH ON FILTER_549.o_custkey = PROJECTION_545.c_custkey
       -         1  │└PROJECT c_custkey
       -         1  │ PROJECT c_custkey
       -         1  │ FILTER (c_custkey = 1) AS a7
       -    150000  │ TABLE SCAN customer
       -   1500000  FILTER (o_custkey = o_custkey) AS a4
       -   1500000  TABLE SCAN orders
queries.sql:
SELECT COUNT(c.c_custkey)
FROM (
  SELECT *
  FROM tpch_sf1.customer
  WHERE c_custkey = 1
) AS c
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM tpch_sf1.orders AS o
  WHERE o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
);

theorem.description: Count CUSTOMER rows without a matching ORDERS row via NOT EXISTS with a one-sided CUSTOMER key filter
theorem.name: PLAN_JOIN_CHECK-ANTI-CUSTOMER-ORDERS-FILTER-CUSTOMER
